# User template — Business communications (English)

## Placeholders

`{{comm_type}}` `{{recipient}}` `{{context}}` `{{tone}}` `{{must_include}}` `{{deadline_or_next_step}}`

## Template

"Draft `{{comm_type}}` for `{{recipient}}`. Context: `{{context}}`. Tone: `{{tone}}`.  
Must include: `{{must_include}}`. Next step / deadline: `{{deadline_or_next_step}}`.  
Do not invent legal commitments not stated in context."

## Filled example

"Post-meeting follow-up email to a tourism company procurement lead. Context: we proposed a quarterly content package. Tone: **Professional Premium**. Include: indicative 10-week timeline. Next step: confirm scope on Thursday 3pm call."
